message:
feat(vendored/mux_client): Cx-first floating/layout/stack op siblings (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Add `_with_cx` siblings for 10 DirectMuxClient pane/layout/stack ops
that previously had only legacy variants:

- create_floating_pane_with_cx
- move_floating_pane_with_cx
- set_floating_pane_z_with_cx
- toggle_floating_pane_with_cx
- remove_floating_pane_with_cx
- swap_to_layout_with_cx
- set_layout_cycle_with_cx
- cycle_stack_with_cx
- select_stack_pane_with_cx
- update_pane_constraints_with_cx

Routes through a new private `expect_unit_response_with_cx` helper
that mirrors the legacy `expect_unit_response` but goes through
`send_request_with_cx` so cx cancellation/budget/virtual-time
propagate into each op's unix-socket roundtrip.

All legacy methods preserved unchanged.

Regression test `create_floating_pane_with_cx_roundtrip` pins the
contract: set up a mock mux server handling the handshake +
CreateFloatingPane PDU, connect a cx-first client, call
create_floating_pane_with_cx, verify server observed the
tab_id/pane_id/rect and sent UnitResponse back. Since all 10
siblings share the same helper, this test validates the pattern
for the entire group.

Verified via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/
ft-rusticmaple-target, --features vendored,asupersync-runtime):
test passes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
